qwen_35a3_text_count.note: Text-only count from HF Qwen3.5 MoE modeling classes; excludes vision tower.

deepseek_v4_flash_count.note: Logical architecture count from DeepSeek-V4 inference/model.py modules; excludes quantization scale tensors and runtime KV-cache buffers.
